chunks.title: v1model egress_spec and drop behavior
chunks.text: standard_metadata.egress_spec selects the output port. mark_to_drop sets drop behavior and should be treated as evidence for dropped packets.

chunks.title: P4 LPM forwarding tables
chunks.citation: P4 coding practice note, longest prefix match forwarding
chunks.text: An IPv4 LPM table commonly matches hdr.ipv4.dstAddr and invokes a forwarding action that writes standard_metadata.egress_spec.
